signals.reasoning: Keep managing the live TAO short. It is now at fresh peak P&L, has no giveback pressure at all, and the board remains clearly bearish enough to support the short thesis.
BTC has improved, but the caution regime and better alt setups keep it in watch mode rather than action mode.
ETH is constructive but still not a clean enough setup to justify fresh risk under caution.
SOL is a modest bearish lean because mechanics have rolled over and funding is no longer helping the prior long case.
DASH remains one of the better reduced-confidence longs because mechanics are strong and funding is still supportive for continuation.
FOGO remains a clean bearish name because both price and mechanics continue to lean negative.
AVNT is too average on both edge and trade quality to justify action.
ARB is one of the strongest reduced-confidence longs on the board because mechanics are very bullish and funding has turned clearly supportive for a squeeze-style continuation.
CHILLGUY remains extended and crowded, which keeps it below the threshold for a fresh trade.
ZEREBRO still lacks enough clean edge or quality to justify action.
